audit_gates.question: Are all admissibilities, hypotheses, and cost functionals source-identified and frozen before execution?
Is target Delta L unavailable to the generator, association selector, and topology transaction selector?
Are support/path records generated before Delta L projection/readout?
Do all mandatory negative controls execute and separate from theorem cases?
Are charge labels, handedness labels, imposed support classes, same/opposite labels, and target outcomes absent from generator inputs?
Are insertion/removal transactions triggered only from center-gradient admissibility and a separately approved transaction policy?
Does cyclic/reflection redressing preserve the report class?
Do + and - branches remain exact scalar-sign conjugates through split and association formation?
Are odd-center and even-center path cases both handled without ad hoc center special casing?

certification_rule: Every gate blocks certification if false.
